title: Error
description: The ONLY error shape any EDIFIS endpoint returns. Both apps branch on `code`, never on HTTP status alone.

code.description: token_revoked = the revocation list (pulled at sync) names this token. idempotency_replay = a {id,revision} already applied (treated as success-equivalent, returned for transparency). node_mode_unsupported = a cloud-only feature called on a local node.

details.description: Field-level validation errors when code = validation_failed.
